[[File:Salesman.png|150px|left|alt=Salesman]]

The Salesman is a [[Visitors|Visitor]] that shows up to offer a random commodity. Occasionally, if you've been purchasing items from him, he will offer a survey. Rating him 0-stars 3 times and winning the fight rewards one random item from his list of commodities, as well as {{RewardIconWithText|1h Soul Green|green}} (Soul of Salesman). Or he can show up from a positive review and give you {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}} (repeatable). Eventually he will show up again to offer new items.

{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Weakness
|-
|Salesman||6,188||4,644||32,267||AFFCT 14,700
|}

Relics can only be received from the Salesman once.

{{Clear}}

{| class="wikitable"
!'''Type'''
!'''Commodity'''
!'''Contents'''
!'''Price in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}s'''

|-
| rowspan="1" |'''Agricultural Supplies'''
|{{RewardIconWithText|Organic Feed}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sunny Plant Food}}
|60k

|-
| rowspan="2" |'''Cleaning Supplies'''
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mr Tough Cleaner}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +20|blue}}
|12k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Super Power Glue}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +10}}
|9k

|-
| rowspan="2" |'''Electronic Device'''
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ayden Disc}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Unknown Record, +1|orange}}
|45k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gundan Drone}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Drone, +3}}
|45k

|-
| rowspan="3" |'''Good Stuff''' 
|{{RewardIconWithText|Face Wash}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}
|6k 
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Hand Cream}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Orange Reagent, +5|orange}}
|36k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Snail Figure}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Snail Figure|green}}
|36k 

|-
| rowspan="3" |'''Living Supplies'''
|{{RewardIconWithText|73 Disinfectant}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Green Organ Slime, +200|green}}
|45K
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Bonley Fast Drying Paint}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Coating Bucket, +2|orange}}
|45K
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Schrodinger's Gel}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Quantum Gel, +500}}
|45K

|-
| rowspan="2" |'''Outdoor Goods''' 
|{{RewardIconWithText|Electric Fishing Net}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Electric Fishing Net|green}}
|36k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Golden Pickaxe}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe|orange}}
|18k


|-
| rowspan="4" |'''Toiletries'''
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dispolo Body Wash}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +1k}}
|9k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Johns Baby Powder}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +1k}}
|9k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Philosopher Soap}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Philosopher Soap|green}}
|36k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Tyreal Shampoo}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +1k}}
|9k 

|-
| rowspan="3" |'''Toys'''
|{{RewardIconWithText|Spaceship Model}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Spaceship Model|green}}
|36k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stone Toy Bricks}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +1k}}
|9k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood Toy Bricks}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +1k}}
|9k
|}

[[Category:Visitors]]
[[Category:Salesman Relics]]
